People

Sayed Erfan Arefin

PI

Assistant Professor in Computer Science at the University of Dayton. Works on cybersecurity, side-channel attacks, and generative AI.

Tarun Aditya Kusupati

Graduate Student

Graduate student working on LLMs, side-channels, and ransomware detection, with a focus on classification and experimentation.
